title: Robin's Outer Wilds
description: A prototype of a mod that adds features from Outer Wilds
body:
This is a prototype of a mod made to introduce a dynamic solar system into minecraft using systems similar to those found in the game Outer Wilds.

This mod was made for the Origins discord Space Jam.

This planet turns the overworld into a non-euclidian looping cube. This means the whole world is a repeating area 6 of 32x32 chunks, on a seemingly flat plain. But if you were to build up into space, you will leave the planet and end up floating away in a zero gravity environment, where you can freely propel yourself in any direction.
